# Auto-generated by modulestrap pattern (mirrors cardstack's CMakeLists.txt)
# — safe to customize. Only compile Cupcake sources + pull in LVGL when it's
# the selected UI backend, so other devices' binaries stay lean.
#
# Icon .c files are vendored directly here (relative-path SRCS) the same way
# source/modules/meshtastic/CMakeLists.txt vendors nanopb: modulestrap's
# component discovery only scans source/modules/*/module.pcat and
# source/drivers/*/*/driver.pcat, so a bare source/assets/ folder isn't
# auto-discovered as a component on its own.
if(CONFIG_PURR_UI_BACKEND_CUPCAKE)
    set(CUPCAKE_SRCS
        cupcake_module.c
        cupcake_hal.c
        cupcake_ui.c
        cupcake_win.c
        ../../assets/icons/generated/48/settings.c
        ../../assets/icons/generated/48/about.c
        ../../assets/icons/generated/48/terminal.c
        ../../assets/icons/generated/48/fileman.c
        ../../assets/icons/generated/48/calculator.c
        ../../assets/icons/generated/48/tools.c
        ../../assets/icons/generated/48/all_apps.c
    )
    set(CUPCAKE_REQUIRES esp_common driver freertos nvs_flash lvgl__lvgl app_manager)
else()
    set(CUPCAKE_SRCS "")
    set(CUPCAKE_REQUIRES "")
endif()

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${CUPCAKE_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS
        .
        ../../kernel/core
        ../../kernel/catcalls
        ../../assets/icons
    REQUIRES esp_common driver freertos nvs_flash lvgl__lvgl app_manager
)
